character.name: Full-body portrait of a single
character.prompt: Full-body portrait of a single Janissary orta standard-bearer on a flat mid-grey background, studio lighting with no environment. Male, early 40s, stocky powerful build, weathered olive skin with leathery texture from decades of sun, deep-set brown eyes beneath heavy brows, a long drooping grey-flecked mustache extending past the jawline with a short squared beard, shaved head beneath a tall white bork headdress with a dented brass holder and a faded red plume. Wearing a deep forest green kaftan with brass-button frogging across the chest, a crimson sash knotted twice at the waist, dark brown sirwal trousers, scuffed brown leather boots with iron hobnails. Both hands grip the wooden staff of a heavy crimson silk sanjak banner trimmed in gold thread, its pole planted firmly on the ground, the draped fabric frozen mid-fold. A battle-axe hangs from a loop on his belt. Scarred knuckles and a burn mark climbing his left forearm from powder flash. Expression hard, unblinking, the face of a man who has held formation while cavalry charged. Symmetrical stance, three-point neutral light, no cast shadow. Hyperrealistic, 8K, clean character sheet, no background, no environment.
